title: Tangy Gooey Spanish Grana Padano Pisto Manchego
description: A fermented and gooey solo dinner dish from the Basque region of Spain, featuring Grana Padano cheese and a mortar pestle pounded sauce, onion and garlic free, in the style of Pisto Manchego.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a mortar, pound the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper into a fine powder.
Add the diced red bell pepper, zucchini, and tomato to the mortar and pound until coarsely chopped.
In a large bowl, combine the pounded vegetable mixture, crumbled Grana Padano cheese, and extra virgin olive oil, mixing until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a small baking dish and bake for 20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the Pisto Manchego hot, garnished with additional smoked paprika if desired.
